text:
The Yul National Treasury (, Yuru Kokuhō-kan) is the origin place of the Solid-Gold Execution Sword. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 

Background

The Yul National Treasury once held the Solid-Gold Execution Sword. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The Solid-Gold Execution Sword from the Yul National Treasury is auctioned off at the Underground Auction. 

Translations around the World

References
